findings.description: The callout box '試験にはコレが出る！' contains 3 bullet points (経営理念とは企業の存在意義 / ビジョンとは会社が目指す将来の姿 / 経営戦略とはビジョンを実現するための具体的な行動計画) that are visible in the image but not extracted as structured content — only the bare caption is stored. Acceptable for a figure entity but bullets carry exam-relevant content.
Opening paragraph text block (経営理念は経営者や社員が日々の業務で迷った際の判断基準になります…) on the page is not represented by any entity. Narrative prose omission, low impact.

reviewer_notes: R1.1 fix confirmed: figure caption jp is '試験にはコレが出る！' as required. Both term entities (ビジョン, 経営戦略) and the section entity are accurate vs the image. The only gaps are the callout bullet text and opening prose, both low-severity omissions typical of figure-level capture.
